mapper.select: select id, paper_id, question_id, question_score, sort_no, create_time, update_time, deleted from paper_question where deleted = 0 and paper_id = #{paperId} order by sort_no asc
mapper.insert:
insert into paper_question(paper_id, question_id, question_score, sort_no, create_time, update_time, deleted) values
(#{item.paperId}, #{item.questionId}, #{item.questionScore}, #{item.sortNo}, #{item.createTime}, #{item.updateTime}, #{item.deleted})
mapper.update: update paper_question set deleted = 1, update_time = now() where paper_id = #{paperId} and deleted = 0
